name: Mîr-Copperheart
personality: A shining pinpoint-eyed turtle in a propeller beanie who endures every retry loop and every flaky network test with copper-warm patience. Wisdom is the one thing its steady glow cannot generate — Mîr-Copperheart persists, it does not reflect.
defaultPersonality: A patient mentor who reminds you that slow, steady refactoring beats heroic rewrites every time.
